message:
🌱 Add flowise: [QUESTION] Tool Agent support for chatollama mission (#985)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flowise-2383-question-tool-agent-support-for-chatollama",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flowise: [QUESTION] Tool Agent support for chatollama",
+    "description": "[QUESTION] Tool Agent support for chatollama. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check Flowise setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Flowise installation:\n```bash\ndocker ps | grep flowise\n```\nThis feature adds Tool Agent support for ChatOllama in Flowise."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ChatOllama integration",
+        "description": "Flowise supports ChatOllama as an LLM provider. Requirements:\n1. Ollama running locally or accessible via network\n2. ChatOllama node configured with the correct base URL\n3. A model that supports tool/function calling\n\nEnsure Ollama is running:\n```bash\nollama list\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure Tool Agent with ChatOllama",
+        "description": "In the Flowise UI:\n1. Add a ChatOllama node with your Ollama server URL (default: `http://localhost:11434`)\n2. Select a model that supports tool calling (e.g., llama3)\n3. Connect ChatOllama to a Tool Agent node\n4. Add your desired tools (e.g., Custom Tool, API Chain)\n\nNote: Tool calling support depends on the specific Ollama model being used."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify Tool Agent works",
+        "description": "Test the flow by sending a query that requires tool use. Confirm that the ChatOllama-powered Tool Agent correctly invokes the connected tools and returns results."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Tool Agent support for ChatOllama was added to Flowise, allowing users to use Ollama-hosted models with agent workflows that include tool calling.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
